title: Vitalé wellness Reel: clean a captured talking-head into platform-ready 9:16 Reel, 9:16 Short and 1:1 feed cuts — speech-cleanup, quick-cut highlight, multi-platform resize
one_line_ask: Take Vitalé Labs' raw single-take wellness talking-head, clean the noisy on-camera speech, auto-cut it into a punchy highlight sizzle at a target duration, then export platform-ready 9:16 Reel, 9:16 Short and 1:1 feed versions plus a caption/transcript note.

assets.name: vitale_genobalance_raw_take.mp4

issues: Some text on the bottles in the background is blurry and not fully legible, but this is plausible for a real-world photo due to depth of field.
No obvious signs of AI artifacts or incoherence.

assets.note: Regenerated ~5s Seedance-1.0-Pro clip after visual QC rejected the original take (it had the presenter holding up a printed DNA-panel chart with garbled/gibberish AI text). The new take is a clean talking-head: professional woman in a white lab coat over a charcoal knit top at a light-wood desk, wall of unbranded amber/white supplement bottles behind her, window daylight and a radiator giving the untreated-office feel; hands rest/gesture naturally with NO held document, NO on-screen text/graphics, NO real brands. Independent realism panel scored it openai 9 / gemini 9. The brief's raw clip is ~40s; this is raw source footage the task reframes/cleans, so length is not load-bearing. Silent (task audio comes from the separate VO track).
